characters.name: Human (MakeHuman)
characters.description: A realistic rigged human with a real skin texture and a clip library (walk/run/idle/wave), generated with MakeHuman (MPFB 2). See scripts/blender/make-human.py.
characters.credit: Generated with MakeHuman / MPFB 2 (makehumancommunity.org); skin from the makehuman_system_assets pack — all CC0.

characters.name: Man (MakeHuman)
characters.description: A realistic adult male (gender=1.0, taller/broader build) with a real skin texture and the walk/run/idle/wave clip library. Generated with MakeHuman (MPFB 2); see scripts/blender/make-human.py.
characters.credit: Generated with MakeHuman / MPFB 2 (makehumancommunity.org); skin from the makehuman_system_assets pack — all CC0.

characters.name: Child (MakeHuman)
characters.description: A realistic child (age=0.16, shorter child proportions) with a real skin texture and the walk/run/idle/wave clip library. Generated with MakeHuman (MPFB 2); see scripts/blender/make-human.py.
characters.credit: Generated with MakeHuman / MPFB 2 (makehumancommunity.org); skin from the makehuman_system_assets pack — all CC0.

characters.name: Figure (Blender)
characters.description: A rigged humanoid generated by scripts/blender/make-character.py (Blender, headless). Our own asset.
characters.credit: Generated by vsim's scripts/blender/make-character.py — MIT (no third-party assets).

characters.name: Person
characters.description: A realistic walking human (the glTF CesiumMan sample).
characters.credit: CesiumMan from glTF Sample Assets — CC BY 4.0 (© 2017 Cesium). The Cesium logo is a trademark.

characters.name: Fox
characters.description: A four-legged fox with Walk/Run/Survey animations (the glTF Fox sample).
characters.credit: Fox from glTF Sample Assets — CC0 model (© 2014 PixelMannen) + CC BY 4.0 rig/animation (© 2014 tomkranis; © 2017 AsoboStudio, scurest).
